 ## Strategy
-- S1 is main sub base. Price $19.
-- Target D_S07 (Data Analysts) and D_S10 (Music Producers) for Plan B ($49) as their quality floors are < 0.3.
-- Target D_E02 and D_E09 for Enterprise leads (floor ~0.35).
-- STOP targeting E1 (quality floor 0.736 is too high).
-- R&D Tier 1 complete. No more R&D for now (preserve cash).
-- Burn: ~$1.1k/day. Runway: ~11 weeks.
+- Individual: Plan A ($19/T1), Plan B ($59/T2). Low tiers for margin.
+- Enterprise: Plan C ($199/T5). Target D_E02 and D_E09.
+- Targeted Dev Spend: $100/day for S1, S3, D_S07, D_S10, D_E02, D_E09.
+- Quotas: A=1200, B=4000, C=15000 to fix "quota wall" complaints.
+- Ads: $50/day across Search (S1, D_S07), Social (S1, D_S10), LinkedIn (D_E02, D_E09).
+- Goal: Get Enterprise leads ASAP to fix runway.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 1: 0 subs.
-- Week 2: 1 sub.
-- Week 3: 16 subs.
-- Week 4: 27 subs.
+- Week 1-4: (see previous)
 - Week 5: 40 subs ($76,477 cash).
-- Quality: base 0.2 + global_bonus 0.1025 + R&D 0.0289 = ~0.33.
+- Week 6: 62 subs ($69,501 cash). Burn ~$7k/week.
+- Quality: base 0.2 + global_bonus 0.1088 + S1_bonus 0.03.
+- Feedback: Huge amount of "quota wall" complaints. AI quality praised.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- LinkedIn for E1 was zero leads.
-- Search ads for S1 are working (~$67 CAC).
-- Contradiction in instructions: log_rationale is now part of next_week (13th arg).
+- Model tiers were too high (T3/T4) for $19/$49 prices. Margin was near zero or negative.
+- Enterprise needs quality > 0.35. Tier 5 (1.1x) is necessary.
+- next-week requires rationale + 12 cash forecasts.
 
 ## To Do
-- Monitor if D_S07 and D_S10 convert to Plan B.
-- Watch for Enterprise leads in D_E02/D_E09.
-- If cash keeps dropping at $7k/week, cut dev/ops further or halt ads.
+- Watch for D_S07 and D_E02/09 conversions.
+- Check if higher quotas silence the social media complaints.
